sections.paragraph:
unused in Kal, to shine, to be bright, cognate root יָפָה.

Hiphil הֹופִיעַ.-

(1) to cause to shine, used of God, Job 37:15.

(2) to give light, to be bright, (prop. to scatter, or bestow light, like הֵאִיר), Job 3:4 10:3 especially used of Jehovah as appearing in very bright light, Deu 33:2 Psa 50:2 80:2 94:1 .

Derivatives, the pr.n. יָפִיעַ, מֵיפַעַת and-
